courses.title: Data Structures, Algorithms and Problem Solving

contents: Contents: Cloud server concepts and technologies including Node.js, NoSQL, MongoDB, MVC, Express.js, EJS, Docker, Oauth, Cloud platform, and Virtual Machine.
outcomes: Outcomes: Students understand and learn cloud server development technologies and complete a cloud server project.

contents: Contents: Concurrent network concepts and programming technologies including livelock, message passing, asynchronous communications, packet switching, Diango, Flack, Python, Programming testing and development tools.
outcomes: Outcomes: Students understand, learn and implement a concurrent network server project using Python.

contents: Contents: Fundamental data mining technologies including data preprocessing and machine learning algorithms.
outcomes: Outcomes: Students understand, learn and implement data preparation, processing, and mining processes (RapidMiner).

contents: Contents: Advanced data mining technologies including curve fitting, dimension reduction, kernel trick, regularization, and model assessment techniques.
outcomes: Outcomes: Students understand, learn and implement the learned technologies for solving a real problem.

fyp_projects.description: Group 1 developed a scanning enabled personalized calendar (UI, database and function design).
Group 2 developed a personalized calendar for travelers (UI, database and function design).
Group 3 developed a waste classification and detection system (including data collection, model training, and system integration).
Group 4 developed a video content searching and management system (system integrated with AI).
Group 1 developed a toilet finder app in Hong Kong (UI, database and function design).
Group 2 developed an AI-powered daily event calendar (system integrated with AI).
Group 3 developed an AI waste classification application (system integrated with AI).
Group 4 developed an Android calender app tailor-made for students (UI, database and function design).
Group 1 developed a computer interaction system for the disabled using EEG headsets and eyetrackers.
Group 2 developed a web3 platform for Electronic Health Record Sharing.
Group 3 developed a web3 social media platform.
Group 4 developed a mobile mobility app that integrates multiple mobility methods in HK.
Group 1 aims to develop a UAV-based mountain search and rescue system.
Group 2 aims to develop an AI-powered mobility app in HK.
Group 3 aims to develop a video-based drone behavior detection and monitoring system.
Group 4 aims to develop a Web3.0 app to enhance cybersecurity.
Group 5 aims to develop a VR app for route navigation.

workloads: Making presentation schedule for both courses in a whole academic year.
Coordinate the course contents, timetables, assignments, and exams with tutors in a whole academic year.
Check and update the course materials. Address students learning issues.
